message:
refactor(fcp-manifest,fcp-registry,fcp-host): migrate to canonical fcp-core artifact types

Consuming-side migration for the FCP3 canonical artifact types: replace
local type definitions with fcp-core re-exports and use SchemaId methods
instead of inline construction.

fcp-manifest/lib.rs:
- Remove ObjectIdRef (52 lines) — replaced by ObjectId::parse_prefixed/
  to_prefixed_string + serde helpers from fcp_core::util::objectid_prefixed
- Change SignaturesSection::transparency_log_entry from Option<ObjectIdRef>
  to Option<ObjectId> with objectid_prefixed::option serde attribute
- Change SupplyChainAttestationRef::object_id from ObjectIdRef to ObjectId
  with objectid_prefixed serde attribute
- Add ObjectId to fcp_core imports
- Add test_manifest_hash_stability verifying interface hash is stable
  across supply_chain and policy section additions
- Update ObjectIdRef tests to use ObjectId::parse_prefixed

fcp-registry/lib.rs:
- Remove ConnectorTarget, ConnectorManifestObject, ConnectorBinaryObject,
  ConnectorBinarySymbolSet (total ~80 lines) — now pub use re-exported
  from fcp_core
- Replace all SchemaId::new("fcp.registry", ...) with canonical
  Type::schema() methods (8 call sites)
- Add descriptor_oti_from_store() and store_oti_from_descriptor() for
  ConnectorBinaryTransmissionInfo ↔ ObjectTransmissionInfo conversion
- Remove unused semver::Version import

fcp-host/discovery.rs:
- Stream JSON directly into BLAKE3 hasher via serde_json::to_writer
  instead of allocating Vec<u8> intermediate buffer for ETag computation
- Replace "Not Modified".to_string() with String::from("Not Modified")

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
